title: Degrees of Freedom: The Trade-off Between Model Complexity and Estimation
description: This flowchart illustrates the core concept of degrees of freedom (DoF) as a measure of model flexibility. It shows how DoF connects to model complexity, the bias-variance trade-off, and ultimately, the goal of achieving robust generalization from a finite dataset.
relationships: A model uses parameters which consume DoF to fit the Dataset
More parameters lead to higher Model Complexity and higher DoF
High DoF can lead to low Bias but high Variance
Low DoF can lead to high Bias but low Variance
The optimal model finds a balance in the Bias-Variance Trade-off to minimize Generalization Error
